name: accio-anthropic-bridge
description: Anthropic-compatible proxy that bridges requests into Accio's local gateway

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/direct-llm.js && node --check src/gateway-manager.js && node --check src/routes/anthropic.js && node --check src/routes/openai.js && node --check src/routes/health.js && node --check src/stream/anthropic-sse.js && node --check src/stream/openai-sse.js && node --check scripts/capture-token.js && npm test
